title: Vegan Filipino-Style Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan Filipino-inspired rice bowl filled with a variety of sautéed vegetables and served with a side of spicy vegan sambal.

ingredients.name: Rest
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, zucchini, and mushrooms

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the cooked brown rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Season with soy sauce and rice vinegar to taste.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving bowl and top with chopped green onions and a side of spicy vegan sambal.
